restrictions: Preserve the approved raster master and the original source candidate unchanged.
Do not add text, watermarks, franchise logos, official emblems, trademarks, or direct copies of existing game assets.
Do not claim that the selected design is owned by a game publisher.
Keep the base mascot recognizable and limit application role elements to approximately 25 percent of the visual identity.
Create platform exports and role variants as derivatives in separate files.

generationReferenceHistory.identityHistory: The Gnaroshi name and visual history combine the impression of a small agile wild beast with a strong fantasy warrior presence.
generationReferenceHistory.candidateGeneration: Generated as one of eleven raster identity candidates from the owner-created origin reference using a shared prompt that prohibited text, watermarks, franchise logos, official emblems, trademarks, and exact existing-character copies.
generationReferenceHistory.selection: The owner selected identity/candidates/07-cel-shaded.png as the final visual base on 2026-07-12.
generationReferenceHistory.promotion: identity/approved/gnaroshi-base-v1.png is a byte-identical copy of the retained source candidate.
